title: Client Particles Emitter Rate Steady
description: Continuously spawns particles at a consistent rate over time. The spawn_rate controls how many particles appear per second, while max_particles limits the total active count. This is the most common emission mode, used for ongoing effects like torch flames, mob auras, weather effects, potion bubbles, and ambient environmental particles.

max_particles.title: Max Particles
max_particles.description: The maximum number of particles that can exist at once. Can be a number or Molang expression.

spawn_rate.title: Spawn Rate
spawn_rate.description: The number of particles to spawn per second. Can be a number or Molang expression.
